name: fontawesome-search
title: Font Awesome Search
description: Search Font Awesome Pro icons (Classic / Regular) and copy the icon name or SVG.
author: tgines

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your Font Awesome API token from fontawesome.com/account/general. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at runtime.

commands.title: Search Icons
commands.subtitle: Font Awesome
commands.description: Search Classic / Regular Font Awesome icons across names and aliases.
